commands.cmd: read-only schema, planner, cooking, Pantry, allocation, intake, API, UI, test and ownership map

summary: Mapped existing event distinctions and scoped a Nutrition-owned planned projection/allocation slice that avoids concurrent dirty planner and Pantry files.
deviations: The exact GoalBuddy Scout exceeded the single-wait limit, so the PM completed the same read-only map as permitted fallback.
remaining_blockers: Planner-page integration is deferred until concurrent Pantry ownership releases the dirty planner files.
